title: Nuclear Performance
description: Insane framerates with a healthy amount of corner cutting.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3e1fae124c1b1c33656c455253997eb07e6fe7.png)

##

###  A Performance Modpack for Very VERY Low End PCs

### Fast
> This modpack is made for low-end computers and will strip the game to its very core.

### Simple
> This modpack is easy to use, hard to master. If you just want to plug and play, it will work amazing; however, if tinker a little you can get even more performance.

### Modular
> Change whatever you would like, however you like, whenever you like. This pack is just a template, you should change the settings to your heart's desire.

**WARNING**, THIS PACK **MAY** CAUSE GRAPHICAL ISSUES, IF YOU WANT IT TO LOOK PRETTY, THIS PACK ISN'T FOR YOU.
